version_description: Flawless pop-funk fusion from Diana and Nile here. Brilliant use of modulation. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as into repeating to fade over funk guitar figures.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
*RIP the GREAT Bernard Edwards

As heard on the original single release:  https://youtu.be/hDHW5wXBvLw?si=xQ6D8EQfi8GQV8UU


Chord Voicings:

Bb: X13331
Bb6: X13333
C: X32010
Cadd2: X30010
F: XX3211
Fsus2: XX3011
Gm7: 3X3333
[tab][ch]F[/ch]*: 133211
Bbsus2: X13311[/tab]
Abm7: 4X4444
Am7: 5X5555
Bbm7: X13121
Bbm7add4: X11121
Bbm: X13321



[Intro]
N.C.
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb6[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]*  [ch]Gm7[/ch]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]Fsus2[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
I said upside down you're turning me, you're giving love in-stinctively[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Bb6[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]*  [ch]Gm7[/ch]
A-round and a-round you're turning me[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Abm7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
In-stinctively you give to me, the love that I need[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]     [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
I cherish the moments with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]             [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
Res-pectfully I say to thee, I'm a-ware that you're cheating[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But no one makes me feel like you do[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Abm7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]               [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
I know you got charm and appeal, you always play the field[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]     [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
I'm crazy to think you all mine[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
As long as the sun con - tinues to shine[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                  [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]
There's a place in my heart for you that's the bottom line[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]*          [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Abm7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
In-side   out and, round and round[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
In-stinctively you give to me, the love that I need[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]     [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
I cherish the moments with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]             [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]
Res-pectfully I say to thee, I'm a-ware that you're cheating[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7add4[/ch]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]
But no one makes me feel like you do[/tab]


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bbsus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]*   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Up-side   down, boy you turn me[/tab]
